response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio matches the content described in the reference JSON but required manual transcription as no lyrics or transcription were provided. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was used to understand the flow and context of the scenes, but full manual transcription and translation were carried out. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly timed to Anya's speech bursts and energetic transitions to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Oh my god, I celebrated... I celebrated my birthday with a lot of friends too this year. Yeah.
subtitles.english: Oh my god, I celebrated... I celebrated my birthday with a lot of friends too this year. Yeah.

subtitles.original: A lot of the girls came to celebrate my birthday, and also Detective Anya managed to solve that mission. Wow, she's got it.
subtitles.english: A lot of the girls came to celebrate my birthday, and also Detective Anya managed to solve that mission. Wow, she's got it.

subtitles.original: Detective Anya... Did you guys like Detective Anya as well? Detective Anya was pretty cool, but not as cool as me!
subtitles.english: Detective Anya... Did you guys like Detective Anya as well? Detective Anya was pretty cool, but not as cool as me!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, and also special guests! There were special guests!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, and also special guests! There were special guests!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, I can't believe I got to sing with Hatsune Miku! Hatsune Miku-chan!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, I can't believe I got to sing with Hatsune Miku! Hatsune Miku-chan!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, she was really cute. And also for the narration for my story part, Ueda Reina-san narrated!
subtitles.english: Oh my god, she was really cute. And also for the narration for my story part, Ueda Reina-san narrated!

subtitles.original: Oh my god! Ueda Reina-san also... Narration, the story part narration too, right? Ueda Reina-san...
subtitles.english: Oh my god! Ueda Reina-san also... Narration, the story part narration too, right? Ueda Reina-san...

subtitles.original: ...やってくれました！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: ...did it for me! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 美九ちゃんとも歌ったし、いや、盛りだくさんでしたね、今年。
subtitles.english: I also sang with Miku-chan... It was really packed with content this year!

subtitles.original: Oh my god, lots of wild things happening on this year's birthday live. How did you guys like it?
subtitles.english: Oh my god, lots of wild things happening on this year's birthday live. How did you guys like it?

subtitles.original: How did you guys like it? Oh my gosh, yeah, I had a lot of fun!
subtitles.english: How did you guys like it? Oh my gosh, yeah, I had a lot of fun!

subtitles.original: But! I would like to make an announcement this year. It's the usual.
subtitles.english: But! I would like to make an announcement this year. It's the usual.

subtitles.original: ここで告知があります！I have an announcement to make! Let me make an announcement!
subtitles.english: Here, I have an announcement! I have an announcement to make! Let me make an announcement!

subtitles.original: はい、こちら！Oh my god! What is that? Who is that? Is that me? Yes, it is! We're releasing some new merchandises too this year!
subtitles.english: Yes, this! Oh my god! What is that? Who is that? Is that me? Yes, it is! We're releasing some new merchandises too this year!

subtitles.original: What do we have? Let's take a look at them, shall we? そして、えーと、一つずつ見ていきましょう。まずはこちらです！
subtitles.english: What do we have? Let's take a look at them, shall we? And, well, let's look at them one by one. First is this!

subtitles.original: Whoa, it's a canvas art! "Study Time with Anya" canvas art. Oh my god, this illustration is so cute! It's illustrated by Lunar-sensei!
subtitles.english: Whoa, it's a canvas art! "Study Time with Anya" canvas art. Oh my god, this illustration is so cute! It's illustrated by Lunar-sensei!

subtitles.original: Lunar先生にイラストを描いていただきました。可愛い！
subtitles.english: Lunar-sensei drew this illustration for me. It's so cute!

subtitles.original: The theme is, you know, literary girl. Oh my god, so smart! So intelligent! 文学少女というテーマになっております。
subtitles.english: The theme is, you know, literary girl. Oh my god, so smart! So intelligent! The theme is a literary girl.

subtitles.original: 次はこちら！"Study Time with Anya" notebook! This is... I think this is my first notebook! I've never had a notebook as a merchandise before, oh my goodness!
subtitles.english: Next is this! "Study Time with Anya" notebook! This is... I think this is my first notebook! I've never had a notebook as a merchandise before, oh my goodness!

subtitles.original: Please use this lots for all your notes, for anything! いろいろメモしてね、オリジナルノートです。出ます。
subtitles.english: Please use this lots for all your notes, for anything! Make lots of notes on it, it's an original notebook. It's coming out.

subtitles.original: と、次はこちら。It's a pen case! How cute is that? ペンポーチです！ペンポーチも初かな？
subtitles.english: And, next is this. It's a pen case! How cute is that? It's a pen pouch! Is it also my first pen pouch?

subtitles.original: ノートも初らしい、ペンポーチもなんと、え、初です。ぜひ一緒にね、あのノートと使ってください。
subtitles.english: The notebook is also a first, and the pen pouch is, wow, also a first. Please use it together with the notebook!

subtitles.original: Um, use this along with the note. I think they would go really well together, okay?
subtitles.english: Um, use this along with the note. I think they would go really well together, okay?

subtitles.original: 次はこちら。今年もボイス出ます。そして今年も、え、アーニャが台本を書かせていただいております。
subtitles.english: Next is this. A voice pack is coming out this year too. And this year too, Anya wrote the script.

subtitles.original: I wrote the script as usual, as usual per every year. I wrote the script for this situational voice, so please get it! Please get it!
subtitles.english: I wrote the script as usual, as usual per every year. I wrote the script for this situational voice, so please get it! Please get it!

subtitles.original: Oh yeah, the voice will be in Japanese but there will be scripts in Bahasa Indonesia, English and Japanese.
subtitles.english: Oh yeah, the voice will be in Japanese but there will be scripts in Bahasa Indonesia, English and Japanese.

subtitles.original: ちなみにボイス自体は日本語になりますけど、えーと、台本もついてきます。インドネシア語と英語と日本語の台本があります。
subtitles.english: By the way, the voice itself will be in Japanese, but the script is also included. There are scripts in Indonesian, English, and Japanese.

subtitles.original: ぜひ聞いてください。そしてフルセット購入特典はこちら！
subtitles.english: Please listen to it. And here is the full set purchase bonus!

subtitles.original: Oh my god! Limited Edition has... what is that? A hand-signed autograph? Oh my god, it's a first for me!
subtitles.english: Oh my god! Limited Edition has... what is that? A hand-signed autograph? Oh my god, it's a first for me!

subtitles.original: Anya's first ever hand-signed autograph for Limited Edition, please get them!
subtitles.english: Anya's first ever hand-signed autograph for Limited Edition, please get them!

subtitles.original: なんと今年はサイン入りです！今年はサイン入りです、なんと、なんと、なんと...
subtitles.english: Unbelievably, this year it is hand-signed! This year it's hand-signed, wow, wow, wow...

subtitles.original: ...初！初ですね、アーニャが自らサインをして。初なので、ぜひ皆さん、この機会にゲットしてください。
subtitles.english: ...the first! It's the first time Anya signs it herself. Since it's the first time, everyone, please get it on this occasion!

subtitles.original: Yeah, please get the Limited Edition! And for the Standard Edition, it includes a foil-stamped replica autograph, so don't worry if you miss out on the Limited Edition. Yay!
subtitles.english: Yeah, please get the Limited Edition! And for the Standard Edition, it includes a foil-stamped replica autograph, so don't worry if you miss out on the Limited Edition. Yay!

subtitles.original: ということでグッズ紹介は以上です。That's all for the merch...
subtitles.english: And that's all for the merchandise introduction. That's all for the merch...
